taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: HTML, TypeScript, JavaScript, ReactJS, Web Components
skill_match_scores: HTML:0.5, TypeScript:1.0, JavaScript:0.5, ReactJS:1.0, Web Components:1.0
must_have_quals: B.S. or M.S. in Computer Science or equivalent, 0-3 years of professional experience developing interactive web applications, Ability to work independently and strong communication skills within and across teams, Ability and willingness to learn new technologies quickly with a strong interest in full track development, High proficiency in developing software solutions using web application client-tier technologies, including HTML and typescript/JavaScript, ReactJS,/Web components and React Native, Strong knowledge of server-side Java/J2EE technologies, including Spring, NodeJS, Hibernate, JSP, JNDI, JDBC, JMS, Servlets, and XML, Ability to perform independently in a hybrid work environment supported by competent written and verbal communication skills, Experience with microservices infrastructure (e.g. Docker, Container Orchestration [ideally Kubernetes]), Amazon Web Services (AWS) and/or Microsoft Azure
core_responsibilities: Work hand-in-hand with, engineers, user experience designers and product managers to prototype and build a next-generation web application, Provide technical leadership to solve ambitious design problems to deliver best-in-class user experience, Design, deploy, and support secure, efficient, containerized software for Adobe Acrobat Sign, Design & develop key user-facing features, collaborating with the product and the design teams to work on the most optimized and delightful user experience, Work with other Adobe teams to explore diverse technologies and embrace cross-team standards
job_summary: Adobe is looking for a talented and highly motivated Software Engineer to help build and deliver their next-generation Adobe Acrobat Sign service. The role involves working on both front-end and back-end solutions, collaborating with various teams to design and develop a user-friendly web application.
